name: copy-sharepoint-list-columns-between-lists
title: How to Copy SharePoint List Columns Between Lists Using PowerShell
shortDescription: This script copies selected SharePoint list fields from a source list to a destination list using PnP PowerShell and certificate-based authentication.
longDescription: Replicates selected SharePoint list columns by comparing destination fields, copying missing source fields with SchemaXml, and exporting a CSV execution report.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample How to Copy SharePoint List Columns Between Lists Using PowerShell

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
